entries.summary: Add 7 RTM modules (225 items), Content Log dashboard, and reciprocal cross-links.

items.title: Aggressive Non-Functioning Pituitary Neuroendocrine Tumor (PitNET): A Growing Knosp-4 Remnant
items.subtitle: An Endocrine Fellowship Module: reading the pituitary MRI (Knosp grading, post-op artifact vs remnant), choosing re-surgery vs SRS/FSRT vs medical therapy, cabergoline/octreotide/temozolomide roles, and the replacement-monitoring traps (FT4 not TSH, clinical not cortisol, the wrong testosterone regimen)

items.title: Primary Hyperparathyroidism in a Young Adult: Adenoma vs Hyperplasia, and the Genetics Question
items.subtitle: A Resident/Fellowship Module: confirming PHPT and excluding FHH, single-gland adenoma vs four-gland hyperplasia, intra-operative PTH, when (and how) to test genes at age ≤40, and post-parathyroidectomy follow-up (hungry bone vs hypoparathyroidism)

items.title: Klinefelter Syndrome (47,XXY) in Adults: Optimising Testosterone and the Lifelong Surveillance Strategy
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: trough symptoms on testosterone undecanoate and enanthate/cypionate, the 12-week vs 10-week vs 21-day debate, correcting B12 and vitamin D, when to shorten the interval (check trough T and haematocrit first), the high-risk 'reset' after loss to follow-up, and the multisystem surveillance KS demands (bone, breast cancer, metabolic, fertility, psychosocial, autoimmune)

items.title: Gynecomastia from Androgen Deficiency or Resistance: A Case-Based Atlas (10 Published Cases)
items.subtitle: A resident training module across four etiologic buckets — primary/secondary hypogonadism, hyperprolactinemia, congenital & acquired androgen resistance, and drugs that block androgen action; with the gonadotropin-led work-up algorithm and a board-style question bank.

items.title: Low BMI in a Young Adult Woman: A Multisystem Workup Refinement
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: recurrent chest infections + BMI 15–16 + amenorrhea + micronutrient deficiencies with normal stool frequency — immunodeficiency and atypical CF, TB/IGRA, celiac with total IgA, occult malabsorption, FHA vs organic causes, eating-disorder screening, and the sequenced Indian-context algorithm

items.title: Biochemically Resistant Microprolactinoma: Escalation, Echocardiography, and Surgery
items.subtitle: An Endocrine Fellowship Module: DA-agonist resistance after PEG precipitation; pseudo-resistance exclusion; cabergoline titration with mandatory echo monitoring; TSS for a 3 mm microadenoma; symptom management when biochemistry cannot be normalised

items.title: Klinefelter Syndrome (47,XXY): Lifelong Follow-Up and TRT Monitoring Protocol
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: hypergonadotropic hypogonadism and post-pubertal gynecomastia on Inj Cernos 1000 mg; CBC/haematocrit and LFT surveillance; guidelines-based lifelong monitoring calendar from diagnosis to adulthood

items.title: Secondary Osteoporosis in a 33-Year-Old Woman — Vimla's Case
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: POI, thyroid dysfunction, and normal cortisol — secondary osteoporosis exclusion algorithm and treatment sequencing (HRT, thyroid optimisation, bone-specific therapy)

items.title: Denosumab vs. Zoledronic Acid vs. Teriparatide
items.subtitle: Osteoporosis Sequencing, Rebound Risk & Outcome Trials — Verified, With a Skepticism Section

items.title: Incidental Thyroid Ultrasound in Euthyroid Patients: Diagnostic Restraint (5-Case RTM)
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: five comparative vignettes — visa euthyroid heterogeneity (no testing), SCH with TPO, de Quervain thyroiditis, incidental nodule FNA, and preconception TPO surveillance; master algorithm; when TPO/ESR/CRP are and are not indicated

items.title: Leydig Cell Hypoplasia (LCH): Two Published Cases of LHCGR Mutations in 46,XY DSD
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: early childhood LCH Type 1 (Çömlek 2021) and complete pseudohermaphroditism with V144F ER-retained LHR (Richter-Unruh 2004) — hCG stimulation failure, inguinal gonad discovery, and LHCGR sequencing in the 46,XY DSD workup

items.title: Clinical Evaluation of Gonadal Dysgenesis: Five-Case Resident Training Module
items.subtitle: A Resident Training Module: genetic → gonadal → phenotypic sex; Swyer syndrome and MGD across five published cases — hCG stimulation, CAH misdiagnosis trap, FISH for idic(Y) mosaicism, laparoscopic histopathology, and gonadoblastoma risk (~20–30%)

items.title: 17-Hydroxyprogesterone in the Newborn: Pitfalls in Ruling Out or Diagnosing CAH
items.subtitle: A Fellow Training Module: five-coordinate 17-OHP interpretation, false-positive/false-negative patterns, 17 published-case teaching set, diagnostic algorithm, and board-style MCQs — do not use 17-OHP as a stand-alone rule-out

items.title: Direct Renin Concentration (DRC) vs Plasma Renin Activity (PRA) in Primary Aldosteronism Screening
items.subtitle: Evidence-based comparison of ADRR vs ARR — 2025 Endocrine Society cutoffs, assay-specific thresholds, meta-analytic and head-to-head accuracy, and why suppressed renin plus an aldosterone floor matter more than the ratio alone
